zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Reade於大約1495年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏金特波利時，他的父親Sir William Reade42歲，母親Dorothy de Beaumont24歲。他於1519年與Lady Anne Hoo在英國英格蘭波克夏阿炳頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1556年8月27日在英國英格蘭奧可福爾阿炳頓享年62歲，埋葬在英國波克夏阿炳頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Reade于大约1495年出生在英国英格兰波克夏金特波利时，他的父亲Sir William Reade42岁，母亲Dorothy de Beaumont24岁。他于1519年与Lady Anne Hoo在英国英格兰波克夏阿炳頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1556年8月27日在英国英格兰奧可福爾阿炳頓享年62岁，埋葬在英国波克夏阿炳頓。

nameMeanings.name: Reade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Read
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Reed  .

History: A family called Read were established in America in the early 18th century by John Read, who was born in Dublin, sixth in descent from Sir Thomas Read of Berkshire, England. His son, George Read (1733–98), was one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence, and as a lawyer helped frame the Constitution.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Reade was born about 1495, in Kintbury, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Reade, was 42 and his mother, Dorothy de Beaumont, was 24. He married Lady Anne Hoo in 1519, in Abingdon, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 27 August 1556, in Abingdon, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Abingdon, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Reade est né environ 1495, à Kintbury, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Reade, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Dorothy de Beaumont, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Hoo en 1519, à Abingdon, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 27 août 1556, à Abingdon, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Abingdon, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Reade um 1495 in Kintbury, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Reade 42 und seine Mutter Dorothy de Beaumont 24. Er hat 1519 in Abingdon, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Anne Hoo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 27. August 1556 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Abingdon, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Abingdon, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Reade è nato il circa 1495 nel Kintbury, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Reade, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Dorothy de Beaumont, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne Hoo nel 1519, nel Abingdon, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 27 agosto 1556, nel Abingdon, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Abingdon, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Readeが約1495年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアキントブリーで生まれた時，父Sir William Readeは42歳，母Dorothy de Beaumontは24歳であった。1519年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアアビングドンでLady Anne Hooと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1556年8月27日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアアビングドンで62歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアアビングドンにて埋葬された。

ko.Charlton-All-Saints, Wiltshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 찰턴 앨 세인츠
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Reade(이)가 대략 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 킨트버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Reade(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy de Beaumont(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 압잉던에서 Lady Anne Hoo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1556년 8월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 압잉던에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 압잉던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Reade nasceu aproximadamente 1495, em Kintbury, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Reade, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy de Beaumont, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne Hoo em 1519, em Abingdon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de agosto de 1556, em Abingdon, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Abingdon, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Charlton-All-Saints, Wiltshire, England: чарлтон алл сеинц, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Reade родился около 1495 г. в местности кинтбури, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Reade было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Dorothy de Beaumont, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Hoo в 1519 г. в местности абингдон, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 27 августа 1556 г. в местности абингдон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности абингдон, биркшир, Англия.

es.Charlton-All-Saints, Wiltshire, England: Charlton All Saints, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Reade nació aproximadamente 1495, en Kintbury, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Reade, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Dorothy de Beaumont, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Lady Anne Hoo en 1519, en Abingdon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 27 de agosto de 1556, en Abingdon, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Abingdon, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
